description: Campaign timeline templates and rollout schedules

timelines.name: 4-Week Launch Timeline
timelines.description: Standard product launch or major campaign rollout

timelines.name: 2-Week Promotion Timeline
timelines.description: Short promotional campaign for rebates or limited offers

timelines.name: 1-Week Blitz Timeline
timelines.description: Quick campaign for events, flash sales, or same-week opportunities

postingFrequency.facebook: 1 post per day during campaign, 3-4 per week normally
postingFrequency.instagram: 1-2 posts per day during campaign, 4-5 per week normally
postingFrequency.tiktok: 1-2 videos per day during campaign, 5-7 per week normally
postingFrequency.whatsapp: 2-3 broadcasts per week during campaign, 1-2 normally
postingFrequency.email: 1-2 emails per week during campaign, 1 per week normally
